automation_notes: Website has phone-only appointment requests and no online booking flow; likely losing after-hours inquiries.
body:
Hi Bright Smile Dental team,

I came across your website and noticed that appointment requests are phone-only — meaning any inquiry that comes in after hours is likely going unanswered.

For a busy dental practice in Austin, that's real revenue walking out the door.

At AutomateX, we help clinics like yours implement an AI Chatbot + Appointment Scheduling system that captures and books patients 24/7 — no phone tag, no missed opportunities.

Your patients get instant responses. Your front desk gets relief. And you stop losing after-hours inquiries for good.

I'd love to show you how it works in a quick 15-minute discovery call — completely free.

👉 Reply to this email or reach me directly at joseisrael5101@gmail.com to grab a time.

Warm regards,
Jose Castro | Founder, AutomateX
"We automate your business so you can focus on growth"
subject: Bright Smile Dental: Never Miss Another After-Hours Appointment Request

automation_notes: No email capture or abandoned customer re-engagement; social presence is active but customer list building is weak.
body:
Hola equipo de La Esquina Bakery,

Mi nombre es Jose Castro, fundador de AutomateX. Revisé su presencia en línea y noto que tienen una comunidad muy activa en redes sociales — ¡felicidades! Sin embargo, también noté que no cuentan con una forma de capturar correos de sus clientes ni de volver a conectar con quienes ya los visitaron.

Eso significa que cada cliente que entra y sale sin suscribirse es una oportunidad perdida de venta futura.

En AutomateX, ayudamos a negocios como el suyo a construir listas de clientes y automatizar campañas de Email Marketing para generar ventas recurrentes — sin esfuerzo adicional de su parte.

¿Le gustaría explorar cómo esto puede funcionar para La Esquina Bakery? Los invito a agendar una llamada gratuita de 15 minutos.

Jose Castro | Founder, AutomateX
"We automate your business so you can focus on growth"
joseisrael5101@gmail.com
subject: La Esquina Bakery: Conviertan seguidores en clientes frecuentes 🥐📧

automation_notes: Manual quote requests by phone only and no automated follow-up for service reminders.
body:
Hi Northside Auto Repair Team,

I came across your shop and noticed that quote requests are handled by phone only, with no automated follow-up or service reminders in place. For a busy shop in Denver, that means potential customers slipping through the cracks every single day.

At AutomateX, we specialize in Automated Quote Follow-Up + Service Reminders — a system that captures leads, sends instant quote responses, and automatically reminds your customers when their next service is due. No manual calls. No missed opportunities.
